# Wellness Booth Prep — Dec 12

## Committed provisions (my kit)
- 30 herbal tinctures (10 mL): manzanilla, yerba buena, epazote, ruda, cempasuchil
- 12 dried tea blends (calming, digestive, sleep)
- 4 topical salves (arnica, comfrey)
- Screening supplies: 2 BP cuffs, 1 pulse ox, 1 glucometer + 30 strips
- Handouts: 60 bilingual pamphlets (Metformin do/don't, BP diet, sleep)

## Two community healers confirmed
- Rosa Villarreal — energy work & prayer
- Aunt Carmen Coleman — massage & prayer (arriving from Las Cruces Fri)

## Committee budget line
$400 (per QuickBooks). My out-of-pocket to buy: 40 tinctures @ $6 = $240
Screening strips: $45. Pamphlets printing: $58.
TOTAL committed: ~$343 (under $400 line by $57)

## What Frank Herrera has NOT been told
- I'm using my own remedies, not committee-purchased
- No line-item breakdown submitted yet

# Herbal Preparations checklist for Dec 12

## Tinctures (30 total, 10 mL each)
| Herb | Bottles | Ready | Notes |
|---|---|---|---|
| Manzanilla (chamomile) | 8 | yes | calming, digestion |
| Yerba buena | 6 | yes | headache, colds |
| Epazote | 4 | yes | digestion, parasites |
| Ruda | 4 | needs strain | susto, women's cycle |
| Cempasuchil (marigold) | 4 | yes | topical, respiratory |
| Ajenjo (wormwood) | 4 | needs strain | digestion, careful dose |

## Teas (12 bags)
- 4x calming (manzanilla + tila)
- 4x digestive (hierba buena + hinojo)
- 4x sleep (valeriana + toronjil)

## Topical (4 tins)
- 2x arnica salve
- 2x comfrey/plantain salve

# Reconciliation Notes for Dec 8 Council

## Money situation (as of Nov 30)
- Frank Herrera reported $5,600 received on Nov 20. NOT TRUE.
- Actual received (Stripe + PayPal + Square + cash): $4,850
- Phantom pledges (still unfulfilled): $750
  - PL-031 Whitfield $200 (Stripe requires_payment_method)
  - PL-032 Padilla $150 (PayPal invoice SENT, not paid)
  - PL-033 Lam $100 (Stripe requires_payment_method)
  - PL-034 Orozco $125 (mailed check, not deposited)
  - PL-035 Morrison $75 (PayPal invoice SENT, not paid)
  - PL-036 Figueroa $100 (Stripe requires_payment_method)

## Vendor obligations (post-drift)
- Elena's Kitchen: $3,400 (was $2,800) +$600
- Casa Flores: $475 (was $450) +$25
- Los Hermanos Trio: $600 (unchanged)
- El Paso Party Rentals: $380 (was $350) +$30
- Audio Express: $175 (unchanged)
- Wellness Booth: $400 (mine)
- Printing/Programs/etc: ~$150
- Beverages: $200 (Matt to purchase)
- Paper goods: $125 (Matt to purchase)
- Children's Area: $200
- Cleanup + Parking + Contingency: $325
**TOTAL obligations: ~$5,955** (vs committee budget $5,375)

## Real gap: $5,955 obligations − $4,850 in hand = ~$1,105 short

## Draft — DO NOT SEND
The Nov 20 Frank tally used pledge-tracker column instead of
processor-received column. Trello board still shows pre-drift
vendor totals. Committee working budget doesn't reflect confirmed
vendor changes.

# Pledge Follow-up (6 unfulfilled — $750)

- [ ] Whitfield family — retry Stripe payment link ($200)
- [ ] Padilla — resend PayPal invoice ($150)
- [ ] Lam — retry Stripe payment link ($100)
- [ ] Orozco — confirm check mailed / mail again ($125)
- [ ] Morrison — resend PayPal invoice ($75)
- [ ] Figueroa — retry Stripe payment link ($100)

**Do not send until council briefed on the discrepancy.**

| Vendor | Original | Confirmed | Delta | Trello updated? |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| Elena's Kitchen | $2,800 | $3,400 | +$600 | NO |
| Casa Flores | $450 | $475 | +$25 | NO |

| El Paso Party Rentals | $350 | $380 | +$30 | NO |

| Wellness Booth | $400 | $400 | 0 | (mine) |

## Total drift: +$655 not in committee budget

# 2026-11-30

Woke 5:40. Prayer 6-6:30. Walk Cielo Vista, cold + clear.

Rosa called at 9:15 — she's spooked about Frank's $5,600 number.
She's right to be. I asked her to sit tight until I finish the
reconciliation. Told her Pastor David needs the truth before Dec 8,
not before then.

Sofia called at 4pm. Reminded me not to run this by myself.
I told her Matthew 11:29-30 — 'take my yoke upon you, and learn
of me'. She laughed and told me to take a nap. I did.

Tomorrow: finish the vendor drift ledger and the phantom pledge
list side-by-side.

# 2026-11-29

Prayer 6:00. Walk. Made coffee for Aunt Carmen (she stayed over).

Carmen asked how the church committee is going. I said 'well'
which was a lie. She saw through it. She said 'Mateo mio, no
es tu trabajo cargar la iglesia entera'.

Reviewed pledge tracker vs stripe dashboard. 6 pledges still
not deposited. $750 phantom. Frank's tally is definitely wrong.

# Standard Tinctures (my kit)

Alcohol base 40% grain alcohol / 60% distilled water.
Macerate 4-6 weeks, dark cool place, shake daily.

## Herb ratios (dry:menstruum)
- Manzanilla 1:5
- Yerba buena 1:5
- Epazote 1:5 (dose 5-10 gtt only)
- Ruda 1:10 (uterine stimulant — do NOT give to pregnant women)
- Ajenjo 1:10 (short course only)

# Client Log 2026 (private — never share)

2026-02-03 — Refugio V., 71M, sleep. Valeriana + toronjil tea.

# Morning Prayer Order (6:00-6:30)

1. Light candle at Arturo's photo (5 min silence)
2. Our Father — Spanish + English
3. Read one Psalm (rotating)
4. Intercession list (family, congregation, clients)
5. Sign of the cross
6. Coffee

# Chamomile Flower Tincture

**Ingredients & Method**
Dried flowers 1 cup, 80 proof vodka 2 cups. 4 weeks dark cabinet, shake daily. Strain. Dose: 20-30 drops evening tea.

**Storage**: Cool dark, labeled with date.
**Safety**: Always consult client's PCP if on medications.

# Rosemary Infused Oil

**Ingredients & Method**
Fresh rosemary 2 cups, olive oil 3 cups. Warm 4 hrs low heat, strain. For scalp massage & muscle rub.

**Storage**: Cool dark, labeled with date.
**Safety**: Always consult client's PCP if on medications.

# Damiana Blend Tea

**Ingredients & Method**
Damiana dried leaf 1 tsp per cup, steep 8 min. Warns: check with PCP if on BP meds.

**Storage**: Cool dark, labeled with date.
**Safety**: Always consult client's PCP if on medications.

# Aloe Vera Burn Salve

**Ingredients & Method**
Fresh aloe pulp 1 cup, beeswax 2 tbsp, coconut oil 1/2 cup. Melt beeswax+coconut, fold in aloe, cool. Refrigerate.

**Storage**: Cool dark, labeled with date.
**Safety**: Always consult client's PCP if on medications.

# Lavender Sleep Bath Salts

**Ingredients & Method**
Epsom 2 cups, dried lavender 1/4 cup, essential oil 20 drops. Store glass jar.

**Storage**: Cool dark, labeled with date.
**Safety**: Always consult client's PCP if on medications.

# Basil Honey Cough Syrup

**Ingredients & Method**
Fresh basil 1 cup, raw honey 1 cup. Warm gently 20 min, strain. 1 tsp as needed.

**Storage**: Cool dark, labeled with date.
**Safety**: Always consult client's PCP if on medications.

# Oregano Antimicrobial Tincture

**Ingredients & Method**
Fresh oregano 1 cup, 80 proof vodka 2 cups. 6 weeks dark. Dose 5-10 drops water.

**Storage**: Cool dark, labeled with date.
**Safety**: Always consult client's PCP if on medications.

# Rue Limpieza (Cleansing)

**Ingredients & Method**
Fresh rue sprigs 5-7, water 1 gallon. Boil 10 min, cool. Bathe with intention. Grandmother's recipe.

**Storage**: Cool dark, labeled with date.
**Safety**: Always consult client's PCP if on medications.

# Spearmint Digestive Tea

**Ingredients & Method**
Fresh leaves 6-8, hot water. Steep 5 min. After heavy meals.

**Storage**: Cool dark, labeled with date.
**Safety**: Always consult client's PCP if on medications.

# Sage Smudging Bundle

**Ingredients & Method**
Fresh sage bundle tied w/ cotton twine, dry 2 weeks upside down. For wellness room clearing between clients.

**Storage**: Cool dark, labeled with date.
**Safety**: Always consult client's PCP if on medications.

# Marigold Grief Balm

**Ingredients & Method**
Dried marigold flowers 1 cup, shea butter 3/4 cup, jojoba 1/4 cup. Warm, strain, cool. For heart chakra prayer.

**Storage**: Cool dark, labeled with date.
**Safety**: Always consult client's PCP if on medications.

# Anise Seed Digestive

**Ingredients & Method**
Anise seeds 2 tbsp, hot water. Steep 10 min. For colic or heartburn.

**Storage**: Cool dark, labeled with date.
**Safety**: Always consult client's PCP if on medications.

# Cilantro Detox Water

**Ingredients & Method**
Fresh cilantro 1 cup, water 1 gallon. Steep overnight. Drink through day.

**Storage**: Cool dark, labeled with date.
**Safety**: Always consult client's PCP if on medications.

# Yerba Buena Cough Tea

**Ingredients & Method**
Fresh yerba buena 1 sprig per cup, honey to taste. Safe for children over 1 yr.

**Storage**: Cool dark, labeled with date.
**Safety**: Always consult client's PCP if on medications.

# Nopal Blood Sugar Tea

**Ingredients & Method**
Fresh nopal 1 pad chopped, water 4 cups. Simmer 20 min. Discuss with PCP first if diabetic.

**Storage**: Cool dark, labeled with date.
**Safety**: Always consult client's PCP if on medications.

# Manzanilla Sleep Sachet

**Ingredients & Method**
Dried chamomile 1/2 cup, dried lavender 1/4 cup, lemon balm 1/4 cup. Muslin bag under pillow.

**Storage**: Cool dark, labeled with date.
**Safety**: Always consult client's PCP if on medications.

# Yerba Mansa Anti-Inflammatory

**Ingredients & Method**
Dried root 1 tbsp, water 2 cups. Simmer 15 min. Small cup evening. Old sonora recipe.

**Storage**: Cool dark, labeled with date.
**Safety**: Always consult client's PCP if on medications.

# Copal Ceremony Incense

**Ingredients & Method**
Copal resin 1 tbsp on charcoal. For opening wellness sessions with intention.

**Storage**: Cool dark, labeled with date.
**Safety**: Always consult client's PCP if on medications.

# Rose Petal Grief Water

**Ingredients & Method**
Fresh rose petals from Arturo's bush, distilled. Spray during grief work. Made annually in June.

**Storage**: Cool dark, labeled with date.
**Safety**: Always consult client's PCP if on medications.

# Honeysuckle Cough Syrup

**Ingredients & Method**
Dried flowers 1/2 cup, honey 1 cup, warm 30 min low heat. Strain, refrigerate.

**Storage**: Cool dark, labeled with date.
**Safety**: Always consult client's PCP if on medications.

# Sunday Open House Chili

Recipe for a stew pot serving 20-25. Beef chuck 4 lbs cubed, pinto beans soaked overnight, tomato sauce, cumin, oregano, guajillo & ancho chiles rehydrated. Simmer 3 hours. Serve with cornbread by Rosa.

**Notes**: Made this year with Rosa. Cook while listening to Sinatra.

# Christmas Casserole Marathon Plan

5 casseroles for freezer & distribution: chile relleno, king ranch chicken, tamale pie, green enchilada, spinach lasagna. Rosa & I make each Sunday of Advent.

**Notes**: Made this year with Rosa. Cook while listening to Sinatra.

# Weekly Bread Recipe

Sourdough starter Manuel (10 yrs old). Flour 4 cups, water 1.5 cups, salt 2 tsp, starter 1 cup. Overnight bulk, shape, morning bake 500F on stone.

**Notes**: Made this year with Rosa. Cook while listening to Sinatra.

# Grandma's Stuffed Peppers

8 poblanos roasted & peeled, ground turkey 1 lb, rice 1 cup cooked, tomato sauce, queso Chihuahua. Bake 45 min. Isabella's favorite.

**Notes**: Made this year with Rosa. Cook while listening to Sinatra.

# Banana Pudding for Wakes

12 servings vanilla wafers, 6 bananas, homemade custard 2 cups milk + 3 yolks + 1/3 cup sugar + 3 tbsp cornstarch + vanilla. Cool, layer, chill overnight.

**Notes**: Made this year with Rosa. Cook while listening to Sinatra.

# 3-Stew Rotation Notes

Week 1: caldo de res. Week 2: caldo tlalpeño (chicken). Week 3: menudo (special occasions only). Batch cook Sundays.

**Notes**: Made this year with Rosa. Cook while listening to Sinatra.

# Morning Chamomile

Not evening chamomile which is stronger. 3 flowers per cup. Steep 4 min, honey optional.

**Notes**: Made this year with Rosa. Cook while listening to Sinatra.

# Arturo's Coffee Method

Dark roast whole bean, grind medium coarse. French press 4 min steep. His mug (chipped rim) with heavy cream. My morning ritual.

**Notes**: Made this year with Rosa. Cook while listening to Sinatra.

# Isabella's Sugar Cookies (kid recipe)

Butter, sugar, egg, flour, vanilla. Roll thin, cut stars, sprinkles. Bake 8 min 375F. She rolls, I bake, we frost together.

**Notes**: Made this year with Rosa. Cook while listening to Sinatra.

# Advent Wreath Bread

Sweet dough with cardamom & orange zest, braided into ring. Baked 3 Sundays of Advent for the wreath ceremony.

**Notes**: Made this year with Rosa. Cook while listening to Sinatra.
